projects.name: Video Analytics (Safety Equipment Detection)
bullets: Built and optimized YOLO (YOLO11, YOLO26) object detection pipelines for real-time safety equipment detection and truck zone-violation detection across multi-camera feeds in Coal and Aluminium plant.
Implemented a multi-object tracking system with a feedback-driven retraining pipeline to continuously improve model accuracy.
Built and managed backend APIs using FastAPI, with WebSocket-based real-time notifications for safety violation alerts.
Managed Linux-based RTSP recording infrastructure using cron and ffmpeg for continuous camera feed capture.
Automated the end-to-end detection-to-alert workflow, significantly reducing manual monitoring effort for Plant Safety Personnel.

projects.name: Potline AI Chatbot
bullets: Built and maintained a production-grade AI agent using LangGraph to automate data analysis workflows through natural language.
Developed a SQL agent and dynamic chart generation pipeline with Role-Based Access Control (RBAC), converting user questions into database queries and real-time visual insights.
Reduced inference cost by 16x and improved response latency by 3x by routing tasks to smaller LLMs instead of large models.
Designed and implemented an automated scheduling pipeline for Potline Excel reports, enabling timely generation and eliminating manual reporting workflows.
Deployed and maintained the application on on-premises server using IIS.

experiences.title: Software Developer Intern

projects.name: Greenlight Recruitment (ReadyToWork)
bullets: Developed and deployed AI services powering multimodal agents for real-time job/resume based interviews and custom skill assessments, delivering instant personalized candidate feedback within seconds.
Built a microservice for AI-powered resume building and enhancement, tailoring resumes to specific job requirements.
Containerized and deployed services using Docker on a Linux cloud server, streamlining scalability and enhancing deployment reliability.

projects.name: Mock Visa
bullets: Led development and deployment of an AI-powered Mock Visa Interview Simulation Platform, enabling real-time conversational interviews for 100+ concurrent users with low-latency responses.
Integrated LiveKit Agents to orchestrate real-time interactive interview sessions, reducing operational costs by 95% compared to human interviewers.

achievements: Awarded as 'Best Squire' during level up training program.
The project 'AI Powered Presales Automation' won first prize at Product Expo held at Webknot Technologies
